parameters.query:
WITH candidate AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM inbox.processing_jobs
  WHERE job_type = 'index'
    AND status IN ('pending', 'failed')
    AND attempts < max_attempts
    AND run_after <= now()
    AND (nullif($1::text, '') IS NULL OR inbox_item_id = nullif($1::text, '')::uuid)
  ORDER BY created_at
  LIMIT 1
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
),
claimed AS (
  UPDATE inbox.processing_jobs AS jobs
  SET status = 'running',
      attempts = jobs.attempts + 1,
      locked_at = now(),
      locked_by = 'n8n:knowledge-indexing',
      last_error = NULL
  FROM candidate
  WHERE jobs.id = candidate.id
  RETURNING jobs.*
)
SELECT
  id::text AS job_id,
  inbox_item_id::text AS inbox_item_id,
  attempts,
  max_attempts
FROM claimed;

SELECT
  $1::uuid::text AS job_id,
  knowledge.id::text AS knowledge_item_id,
  knowledge.inbox_item_id::text AS inbox_item_id,
  knowledge.user_id::text AS user_id,
  knowledge.title,
  knowledge.summary,
  knowledge.content,
  knowledge.language,
  knowledge.source_url,
  knowledge.metadata,
  inbox_item.content_type,
  attachment.original_name AS file_name,
  attachment.mime_type,
  projects.name AS project,
  categories.name AS category,
  item_types.name AS item_type,
  priorities.name AS priority,
  COALESCE(jsonb_agg(tags.name ORDER BY tags.name) FILTER (WHERE tags.id IS NOT NULL), '[]'::jsonb) AS tags
FROM inbox.knowledge_items AS knowledge
JOIN inbox.inbox_items AS inbox_item ON inbox_item.id = knowledge.inbox_item_id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT original_name, mime_type
  FROM inbox.attachments
  WHERE inbox_item_id = knowledge.inbox_item_id
  ORDER BY created_at
  LIMIT 1
) AS attachment ON true
LEFT JOIN inbox.projects ON projects.id = knowledge.project_id
LEFT JOIN inbox.categories ON categories.id = knowledge.category_id
LEFT JOIN inbox.item_types ON item_types.id = knowledge.item_type_id
LEFT JOIN inbox.priorities ON priorities.id = knowledge.priority_id
LEFT JOIN inbox.knowledge_item_tags AS item_tags ON item_tags.knowledge_item_id = knowledge.id
LEFT JOIN inbox.tags ON tags.id = item_tags.tag_id
WHERE knowledge.inbox_item_id = $2::uuid
GROUP BY knowledge.id, inbox_item.content_type, attachment.original_name, attachment.mime_type, projects.name, categories.name, item_types.name, priorities.name;

INSERT INTO inbox.knowledge_chunks (knowledge_item_id, chunk_index, content, token_count, metadata)
VALUES (
  $1::uuid, $2::integer, $3, CEIL(length($3) / 4.0)::integer,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'user_id', $4::text,
    'inbox_item_id', $5::text,
    'project', $6::text,
    'category', $7::text,
    'item_type', $8::text,
    'priority', $9::text,
    'language', $10::text,
    'source_url', nullif($11::text, ''),
    'content_type', $12::text,
    'file_name', nullif($13::text, ''),
    'mime_type', nullif($14::text, ''),
    'tags', $15::jsonb
  )
)
ON CONFLICT (knowledge_item_id, chunk_index) DO UPDATE SET
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  token_count = EXCLUDED.token_count,
  metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata
RETURNING
  id::text AS chunk_id,
  knowledge_item_id::text AS knowledge_item_id,
  $16::uuid::text AS job_id,
  $5::text AS inbox_item_id,
  $4::text AS user_id,
  $2::integer AS chunk_index,
  $17::integer AS chunk_count,
  content,
  $18::text AS title,
  $6::text AS project,
  $7::text AS category,
  $8::text AS item_type,
  $9::text AS priority,
  $10::text AS language,
  nullif($11::text, '') AS source_url,
  $12::text AS content_type,
  nullif($13::text, '') AS file_name,
  nullif($14::text, '') AS mime_type,
  $15::jsonb AS tags;

WITH removed_stale AS (
  DELETE FROM inbox.knowledge_chunks
  WHERE knowledge_item_id = $2::uuid
    AND chunk_index >= $3::integer
  RETURNING id
),
completed AS (
  UPDATE inbox.processing_jobs
  SET status = 'completed',
      locked_at = NULL,
      locked_by = NULL,
      last_error = NULL
  WHERE id = $1::uuid
  RETURNING id
),
item_ready AS (
  UPDATE inbox.inbox_items
  SET status = 'ready',
      processed_at = coalesce(processed_at, now()),
      error_code = NULL,
      error_message = NULL
  WHERE id = $4::uuid
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM completed)
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  $2::uuid::text AS knowledge_item_id,
  $4::uuid::text AS inbox_item_id,
  $3::integer AS chunk_count,
  $5::integer AS indexed_documents,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM completed) AS job_completed,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM item_ready) AS item_ready,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM removed_stale) AS stale_chunks_removed;
